methodology: Articles sourced from Virginia-specific RSS feeds and Google News RSS, filtered for AI/technology/workforce relevance, then assessed by Claude against the scenario framework. Each article is tagged with the region it most affects and the scenario it signals toward.

signals.title: New partnership between VCU and AI Ready RVA aims to boost AI education, innovation and community impact - VCU News
signals.signal_reading: VCU's partnership with AI Ready RVA signals intentional distribution of deep capability through structured education and community impact—a model for translating metro expertise into peer-to-peer learning networks rather than pure platform dependency.

signals.title: AI trainer says workers must lead technology, not follow it - WDBJ7
signals.signal_reading: An AI trainer emphasizing worker agency ('lead technology, not follow it') in Southwest Virginia directly signals capacity-building for deep engagement rather than passive tool consumption—critical for distributed depth in historically underserved regions.

signals.title: Hampton Roads multiple listing service introduces AI tool to personalize home searches - The Virginian-Pilot
signals.signal_reading: Hampton Roads MLS deploying turnkey AI for home searches exemplifies shallow-but-distributed adoption—platform vendors deliver functionality without requiring deep technical fluency from realtors or consumers, widening access but not expertise.

signals.title: AI is here in Hampton Roads, and businesses and organizations are embracing it - MSN
signals.signal_reading: Hampton Roads businesses 'embracing' AI suggests early-adopter concentration within the metro region's defense-tech ecosystem, but without accompanying workforce development signals, this may deepen rather than distribute capability across Southside and rural areas.

signals.title: AI pressure grows on Richmond's young workforce - Axios
signals.signal_reading: Growing AI pressure on Richmond's young workforce without corresponding access-to-training infrastructure signals anxiety without empowerment—the risk scenario where neither depth of skill nor distribution of opportunity materializes fast enough to meet demand.
